glue.table.CatalogId.Docs: The ID of the Data Catalog in which to create the `Table`. If none is supplied, the AWS account ID is used by default.

glue.table.DatabaseName.Docs: The name of the database where the table metadata resides. For Hive compatibility, this must be all lowercase.

glue.table.TableInput.Docs: A structure used to define a table.
